$bog_docs_landing_Hero_subtitle_sub: Reactive, composable, and lightweight UI framework
$bog_docs_landing_Prop_reactive_text_sub: Automatic dependency tracking with @$mol_mem. No manual subscriptions, no useEffect — state changes propagate instantly.
$bog_docs_landing_Prop_composable_text_s: Declarative view.tree syntax for building UIs. Components nest naturally with one-way and two-way bindings.
$bog_docs_landing_Prop_lightweight_text_: ~100KB bundle with routing, state management, and UI components included. 3x smaller than React+Redux.
